channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Masoud Juma Finds New Stability and Purpose with Kuta Collection FC After Lebanon Stint
item.description: Harambee Stars striker Masoud Juma has opened up about his challenging recent experiences abroad and his current efforts to regain competitive rhythm through Kuta Collection FC. The forward recently r...

item.title: Ontario government proposes major reduction in powers of school board trustees amid concerns over spending
item.description: The Ontario government is moving forward with legislation that would significantly reduce the authority of elected school board trustees while keeping the positions in place. Education Minister Paul C...

item.title: Hanson welcomes Taylor’s tougher migration stance but doubts the Coalition will follow through
item.description: One Nation leader Pauline Hanson has welcomed Liberal leader Angus Taylor’s tougher stance on immigration, saying he has effectively adopted parts of her policy agenda, but she doubts the Coalition wi...

item.title: NDTV article inaccessible due to server access restrictions
item.description: The provided URL from NDTV does not return the actual news article content. Instead, it displays an “Access Denied” message indicating that the server is blocking access to the requested page. The err...

item.title: Noida protest news article inaccessible due to server access restriction
item.description: The requested news article from the provided NDTV URL could not be accessed because the server returned an 'Access Denied' error message. As a result, the actual content of the article is not availabl...

item.title: How Weak Institutions Are Holding African Football Back
item.description: This article takes a deep look at how weak and inconsistent governance is damaging African football on and off the pitch. Using the recent Africa Cup of Nations controversy involving Senegal’s on‑fiel...

item.title: How AI Personalities Influence Human Thinking and Behavior
item.description: The article explores how people perceive artificial intelligence systems, such as large language models, as having distinct personalities, even though these systems lack consciousness, motives, or emo...

item.title: Ex-presidential aide claims Duterte planned to remove Marcos through coup or other means
item.description: Ramil Madriaga, a detained former aide who claims to have served as a bagman for Vice President Sara Duterte, accused former President Rodrigo Duterte of plotting a coup or even an assassination again...

item.title: FG urges increased education investment and school enrolment to reduce street children
item.description: The Federal Government has called on stakeholders across the country to increase investment in education as a key strategy for reducing the number of children living on the streets and improving natio...

item.title: Steve Nyerere Encourages Youth to Focus on National Development Over Political Debates
item.description: Steve Nyerere, a well-known Tanzanian comedian and Chairman of the Mama Ongea na Mwanao initiative, has urged Tanzanians, particularly young people, to move away from unproductive political discussion...

item.title: Featured list of popular C-drama actors recognized for their visuals and influence in 2026
item.description: The article published by Arci Claveria on April 14, 2026, highlights a curated list of popular Chinese drama (C-drama) actors who are currently gaining attention for their looks and influence in the e...

item.title: Rising fuel prices from Middle East conflict drive surge in electric vehicle demand in Asia
item.description: Electric vehicle (EV) sales have significantly increased across Southeast Asia as consumers react to rising fuel prices caused by the ongoing Middle East conflict. The war has pushed global crude oil ...

item.title: Karnataka clears new and additional investment proposals worth ₹18,430 crore expected to generate over 15,000 jobs
item.description: The State High Level Clearances Committee (SHLCC) of Karnataka, chaired by Chief Minister Siddaramaiah, has approved 17 investment proposals amounting to ₹18,430.44 crore. The decision came during the...

item.title: Tanzania and Kenya Enhance Bilateral Ties to Boost Trade and Development
item.description: Tanzania and Kenya have reaffirmed their dedication to strengthening their long-standing relationship through closer economic and diplomatic cooperation. Senior officials from both countries held cons...

item.title: Iyabo Obasanjo steps down after APC adopts Yayi as Ogun governorship consensus candidate
item.description: Iyabo Obasanjo, daughter of former Nigerian President Olusegun Obasanjo and a former Senator representing Ogun Central, has formally stepped down from the 2027 Ogun State governorship race after Senat...

item.title: Mike Lawler Accused of Meddling in NY-17 Democratic Primary Amid Tight Re-election Race
item.description: Republican Congressman Mike Lawler, who represents New York’s 17th District and also chairs the Rockland County Republican Party, has drawn criticism for interfering in the Democratic primary for his ...

item.title: Toronto Tempo select Kiki Rice sixth overall in first WNBA Draft appearance
item.description: The Toronto Tempo made franchise history in the 2026 WNBA Draft by selecting UCLA guard Kiki Rice with the sixth overall pick, marking the team’s first-ever draft selection. The expansion franchise, s...

item.title: Government announces measures to enhance efficiency and capacity of Dar es Salaam Port
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has introduced a wide set of measures aimed at improving the efficiency and competitiveness of the Dar es Salaam Port, with the goal of making it a leading gateway for Easte...

item.title: Pakistan offers to host second round of US-Iran negotiations amid ongoing ceasefire efforts
item.description: Pakistan has taken further steps in its diplomatic mediation between the United States and Iran by proposing to host another round of talks in Islamabad before the ceasefire expires on 21 April. Accor...

item.title: Nigeria and Morocco set to begin joint venture for $25bn trans-African gas pipeline
item.description: Nigeria and Morocco don dey prepare to sign one major intergovernmental agreement in 2026 for the development of the $25 billion Nigeria-Morocco Gas Pipeline. Amina Benkhadra, wey be head of Morocco’s...
